alkylation reagent: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min at 25 °C
cleavage agent: digested in 2 steps at 37 °C [a mixture of trypsin-Lys-C (Promega, Madison, WI, USA)]
collision energy: a normalized collision energy of 28 was utilized for the activation of ions
instrument: coupled to a Q Exactive Plus Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap MS
ionization type: The positive ion mode nanoelectrospray was utilized
reduction reagent: the defense peptides were first incubated with DTT (2 mM)
reduction concentration: the defense peptides were first incubated with DTT (2 mM)
